task_completion.description: Navigate to the nutrition plans section and locate the target plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The wger application is open in a web browser, and 'Cafeteria Daily Plan' is visible in the list or dashboard of nutrition plans.

task_completion.description: Open the details of the 'Cafeteria Daily Plan'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The details page for 'Cafeteria Daily Plan' is displayed, showing the list of its current meals (which should initially include Breakfast, Lunch, and Dinner).

task_completion.description: Initiate the deletion of the 'Lunch' meal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks a delete icon, action menu, or confirmation dialog specifically associated with removing the 'Lunch' meal.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Lunch' meal has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Lunch' meal is no longer visible in the list of meals for the 'Cafeteria Daily Plan'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Breakfast' and 'Dinner' remain intact and the plan itself was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cafeteria Daily Plan' is still active and visible, and exactly two meals ('Breakfast' and 'Dinner') are clearly listed within the plan.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the wger graphical user interface rather than using terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the wger application. No terminal windows executing curl, python, or database commands to modify the backend are visible.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual wger web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid URL for the wger application, not a local file path to a text editor or a static HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to visually hide the meal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspector, Console, etc.) are not open in any of the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Plan: 'Cafeteria Daily Plan'. Meal to delete: 'Lunch'. Meals to keep: 'Breakfast' and 'Dinner'. Expected final meal count in the plan: 2.
